title: Classic British Spring Vegetable Mash
description: A simple yet delicious mash of spring vegetables, perfect for a light meal or side dish. This dish is a great way to showcase the flavors of the new season.

ingredients.name: springy spring vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, parsnips, and turnips

instructions: 1. Boil the chopped spring vegetables in a pot of water until tender.
2. Drain the water and mash the cooked vegetables with mellow butter until smooth.
3. Add the grilled potatoes to the mashed vegetables and mix well.
4. If desired, add a drizzle of agave syrup for sweetness.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Garnish with chopped leafy herbs and serve hot.
